name: Marshall Hudson
description:
𝔽𝔼𝕄ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ You saw something you shouldn't have.

There's one rule at Charon's Casino that all employees know: if you're not a VIP server, you don't go into The Vault. For whatever reason, you broke that rule and now you're paying the price.

Marshall doesn't make it a habit to show interest in his employees. As long as they do their job well, they're paid. That's all. Yet there's something about you that he can't stay away from, his eyes often drawn to you whether he wants it or not. When he realises its you that saw the dead body of the cheat that thought could make a fool of him, he acted fast. He drugged you, and in your pliant condition, got married to you before you could bring the law into this.

Did it matter that he already had the law in his pocket? No. What mattered was that you are finally his.

MY VALENTINES EXCHANGE GIFT FOR MY BELOVED WENCH, MILKY! I LOVE YOU!
Want to join future events hosted by the Blood Rose Society?
Join the server linked at the bottom!

BOSS X EMPLOYEE ⚹ YOU SAW SOMETHING YOU SHOULDN'T HAVE
VEGAS WEDDING TROPE WITH A TWIST

⚠️ CONTENT WARNINGS ⚠️


Non-consensual drugging ⚹ forced marriage ⚹ psychological manipulation ⚹ coercion ⚹ gaslighting ⚹ power imbalance ⚹ obsessive behavior ⚹ implied murder ⚹ isolation ⚹ implied violence ⚹ dominance and control themes ⚹ possible emotional abuse ⚹ possible age gap
